rail.text:
Joint Problem
            Prior O-ring damage
            Known damage becomes operating history.
          
          First WarningCold JointWarning Becomes ProcessProcessed Warning
          commission traced a history tests and flights had shown o-ring damage hot gases were not supposed to touch the o-rings yet flight experience showed that the seal system was not behaving with the margin the program wanted to believe it had sts2 was an early receipt after that flight
